summary: Iteration 54 — ASTEC Cedro Homologation Sprint validation. Backend 12/12 pytest PASS covering sectors (4 areas: Britagem Primária/Secundária, Pátio de Estocagem, Expedição), 61 ativos (>=50 req) with fabricante/modelo/tipo_equipamento populated across all 4 areas, 86 approved planos-inspecao with hierarchy enrichment (ativo_tag/ativo_nome/area_nome), OS with varied statuses (aberta/planejada/em_execucao), planos-por-ativo for BR-01 returns 3 aprovado plans (mecanica, eletrica, lubrificacao), central endpoint returns correct role-scoped items (mec sees only mecanica, operador NEVER sees mecanica/eletrica/instrumentacao), dashboard/stats works per role, and inspecao POST from approved plan succeeds and persists. Frontend UI 6/6 checks PASS: Central Executiva as master shows 24 OS abertas + 45 inspecoes + 61 ativos + 1 parado with real equipment (MT-02, BB-01, PV-01, TC-, CP-01, BL-01); Ativos page lists all 4 areas with fabricante badges (ASTEC, WEG, PARKER, KSB, SCHNEIDER, TOLEDO, ATLAS COPCO); Planos page shows breadcrumb 'Britagem Primária › BR-01 › BRITADOR' with Aprovado status and disciplina/versão/perguntas/data metadata; OS Kanban shows Abertas(16)/Planejadas(6)/Em Execução(2)/Pausadas(0) with sector labels; BR-01 detail Planos tab surfaces Mecânica+Elétrica+Lubrificação aprovado plans; operador login shows 'Central Operacional' + 'Minha Jornada' sidebar with ONLY Producao badges (zero Mecânica/Elétrica/Instrumentação leakage — visibility scoping verified end-to-end).

issues: Requirement asks for '4 area cards with asset counts'. Current UI shows aggregated counters (24 OS abertas / 45 inspecoes / 61 ativos / 1 parado) instead of per-area breakdown. This is functionally rich (grouped by urgency: Vencidas/Em Execução/Para Hoje), but no dedicated per-area (Britagem Primária/Secundária/Pátio/Expedição) count card. Consider adding a top strip with area-level counts for the homologation sprint.

Breadcrumb uses lucide chevron-right icon rather than '›' character (still visually correct). Search functionality: no visible search/filter box on Planos page, which becomes hard at 86 items — recommend adding filter by area/disciplina/tipo/status.

action_items: OPTIONAL (UX polish): Add per-area count strip in Central Executiva master view — 4 cards for Britagem Primária/Secundária/Pátio/Expedição, each showing ativos + OS abertas counts.
OPTIONAL: Add search/filter on Planos de Inspeção list page (by area, ativo, disciplina, status).
OPTIONAL (from iter53 carryover, still open): Fix React hydration warning at App.js:6978 — must be plain text.

OPTIONAL: The POST /api/seed/homologacao endpoint reported 'areas: 0, equipamentos: 0, planos: 0' on re-run — idempotent skip is fine, but the report is confusing. Consider returning both delta AND totals ({created: {areas:0}, existing: {areas:4}}) for operator clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: Seed endpoint POST /api/seed/homologacao is idempotent (skips existing sectors/ativos/planos) — good — but a fresh empty DB will still produce 61 ativos and 86 approved planos as intended.

central.py role adaptation correctly returns 'Central Operacional' + 'Minha Jornada' sidebar for operador and 'Central Executiva' for master. Visibility filter properly excludes {mecanica, eletrica, instrumentacao} for operador across all buckets including sem_data (fix from iter53 holding).
planos-inspecao list N+1 concern from iter53 still stands: per-plan ativo+sector lookups at 86 plans = ~172 extra queries. Recommend $lookup aggregation.
Ativos list mixes areas without explicit grouping. UI relies on sector name badge on each card; a group-by-area accordion would improve navigability at 61 items.
OS Kanban 'Em Execução' shows atrasadas (in red) which is good, but Pausadas/Concluídas columns are empty — consider default filters to hide empty columns or make them collapsible.
test_credentials: master@manutrix.com/master123, test.mec@maintrix.com/tec123, test.ele@maintrix.com/tec123, test.operador@maintrix.com/op123 — ALL VERIFIED working.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed/homologacao invoked once at start of testing. Report: areas=0 (existing), equipamentos=0 (existing), planos=0 (existing), os=9 (new), users=5, inspecoes=15. Total: 61 ativos, 86 approved planos, 24 OS, 45 inspecoes. One TEST_ inspecao created during test_create_inspecao_from_approved_plan and deleted via teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 (ASTEC Cedro Homologation) fully validated. All 12 backend pytest cases PASS. All 6 frontend UI flows PASS: master Central + Ativos + Planos + OS + BR-01 detail Planos tab + operador visibility scoping (zero leakage of restricted disciplinas). Frontend UI is role-adaptive with different titles ('Central Executiva' vs 'Central Operacional') and different sidebars per role. The only design suggestions are OPTIONAL polishing (per-area count strip, planos search filter, hydration warning). No functional bugs found.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs. Visibility filter continues to work correctly for operador after iter53 fix. BR-01 approved plans (mecanica/eletrica/lubrificacao) surface correctly through planos-por-ativo endpoint and UI Planos tab.
